entries.author: Líadan
entries.text: Bish, I'm a mouse. I just say "squeak".

entries.author: Vesperian
entries.text: I'm testing to make sure the identities are working here. Let's see. The chronicles begin.

entries.author: DM
entries.text:
The party convened for the first time, drawing together from separate corners of a fractured world. Kirtas bleeds. The throne is contested. The dead walk roads that armies once marched. And somewhere in the Long Hills, a general fights for a prince no one has seen in years.

The chronicle begins here.
